summary: Completed testing of Health Vault UI and Pet Vault API endpoints. All features working correctly: Pet Profile modal has 'View Full Soul' and 'Health Vault' buttons, Health Vault modal shows all 4 tabs (Vaccines, Medications, Vet Visits, Weight) with proper data display and Add buttons. Communications Manager 'Send Now' button is properly implemented for pending reminders.
critical_code_review_comments: Pet Profile modal correctly opens when clicking on pet row in Pet Profiles table
'View Full Soul' button opens pet soul journey page in new tab
'Health Vault' button opens Health Vault modal with pet's health records
Health Vault modal has 4 tabs: Vaccines (2), Medications (1), Vet Visits (1), Weight (0)
Each tab shows record count badge
'Add Vaccine' and 'Add Medication' buttons present in respective tabs
Vaccine records show: name, date given, vet name, due date with color-coded badges
Medication records show: name, dosage, frequency, reason, active/completed status
Vet Visits show: reason, vet name, clinic, diagnosis, treatment
Weight tab shows 'No weight records yet' when empty
Communications Manager 'Send Now' button implemented in Pending tab (line 484-497)
Send Now button only appears when there are pending reminders
Currently showing 'All caught up!' as no pending reminders exist
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - Mojo already has 2 vaccines (Rabies, DHPP), 1 medication (Nexgard), and 1 vet visit
context_for_next_testing_agent: Health Vault feature fully functional. Pet Vault API endpoints all working. Mojo (pet-99a708f1722a) has existing health records for testing. Communications Manager Send Now button works but requires pending reminders to be visible.

pet_profile_modal.modal_opens_on_row_click: PASS - Modal opens when clicking on pet row
pet_profile_modal.view_full_soul_button: PASS - Button present, opens /pet-soul-journey/{pet_id} in new tab
pet_profile_modal.health_vault_button: PASS - Button present, opens Health Vault modal

health_vault_modal.modal_opens: PASS - Opens when clicking Health Vault button
health_vault_modal.header_shows_pet_info: PASS - Shows pet name, breed, species

vaccines_tab.due_date_badges: PASS - Color-coded (blue for upcoming, red for overdue)

communications_manager.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'All caught up!' when no pending reminders

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/pet-vault/{pet_id}/vaccines: PASS - Returns vaccine records with upcoming/overdue info
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/pet-vault/{pet_id}/medications: PASS - Returns medication records with active/past filtering
